Dalpati About Faculty Education and Qualification Work Experience Research Details PhD Supervision Publications Projects Testing & Consultancy Other Details Latest News & Events Pride of MP in mBaja 2023 18-01-2024 AIR 4th rank in Business Plan Presentation and 5th rank in Cost and Manufacturing at Supra India Competetion 2022 12-09-2022 AIR 7th rank in Formula Bharat 2022 12-09-2022 visit of DDG & Chairman EEB of SAE India on August 20, 2021 03-09-2021 View More Dr. A. Dalpati Designation: Professor Employee ID: 245 Qualification: Ph.D. Date of Joining: 29/03/1995 : 0731-2582371 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr Avadhesh Dalpati joined the department in 1995 as Lecturer in the institute. He is currently Professor and Head of the department, Earlier, he has been associated with Department of Management Studies (DOMS) as the HOD since its inception till 2020 in the Institute. He received his Master of Engineering in Industrial Engineering and Management from Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal. He has earned PhD degree from Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee in the area of supply chain management. He has about 25 years of teaching and research experience at SGSITS, Indore. He has the rich experience of administrative responsibilities such as Chief Warden - Hostels, Co-ordinator-PG Admissions, Member- Career Advancement Commtt. in the institute.He is member in editorial boards of reputed national and international journals. He has successfully guided 03 PhD scholars. He has published more than 50 research papers in various national and international journals and conferences. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 PhD Supply Chain Management 2011 IIT Roorkee 2 M.E. Industrial Engineering & Management 2002 RGPV, Bhopal/SGSITS Indore MP 3 B.E.
